title: Sathaye College Merit List 2026 Important Dates

detail.title: Sathaye College Merit List 2026 Important Dates
detail.short_info: Sathaye College Merit List 2026 is out. Download the 1st Merit List PDF for BA, BCom, BSc and other UG courses for 2025-26 session. Check cutoffs, dates, and admission process at sathayecollege.edu.in.

content.text: Sathaye College (Autonomous), affiliated with the University of Mumbai, has released the Sathaye College Merit List 2026 (First Merit List for the academic year 2025-26). Students can download the PDF from the official website sathayecollege.edu.in and check their status for FYBA, FYBCom, FYBSc, and other undergraduate programs.

rows: PTVA's Sathaye College (Autonomous), Vile Parle East, Mumbai
FYBA, FYBCom, FYBSc, BSc IT, BCom (Accounting & Finance), BAMMC, etc.

sections.heading: Sathaye College Merit List 2026 Important Dates
How to Check Sathaye College Merit List 2026

items: Go to the Admissions or News & Notices section.
Click on the relevant merit list link (e.g., First Merit List for BA/BCom/BSc).
Download the PDF and search for your name using Ctrl+F.
Check your category-wise cutoff and allotted room for verification.

content.text: Direct First Merit List Link (BA/BCom/BSc): Download PDF

sections.heading: Cutoff Details in First Merit List 2026 (Category-wise)

content.text: The college releases minimum percentage cutoffs for different categories:

items: General: Higher cutoffs (e.g., BCom often 70%+, BSc varies by subject).
Reserved Categories (SC/ST/OBC/EWS): Lower thresholds as per University of Mumbai guidelines.

content.text: Exact cutoffs are listed in the official PDF for each program.

seo_tags: Sathaye College BA BCom BSc Merit List
Mumbai University Merit List Sathaye College.
